results.justification: EXACT TWIN — heterogeneous multi-agent council with dedicated consensus model + structured synthesis IS the KOGI-MAMA-COUNCIL aggregation mechanism.
Multi-agent debate with iterative refinement + KS-test stability detection covers the multi-pass contemplative deliberation mechanism.
Multi-LLM parallel querying council with consensus IS the basic council structure.
Open-source council with consensus mechanisms covers the implementation pattern.
Production-grade multi-model council platform IS the deployed-version of multi-elder council.
Democratic council with weighted-voting + specialist-role separation IS the weighted-consensus + per-hazard-specialist paradigm.
Courtroom-style multi-agent debate with role-switching covers structured-deliberation + role-specialist.
Collective-intelligence consensus mechanisms (majority/weighted) cover the aggregation paradigm.
